# Project Snapshot — pulse-js-framework

_Last updated: 2026-03-04_

## Versions

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Package version | 1.11.4 |
| Node.js requirement | >= 20.0.0 |
| Current Node.js | v22.22.0 |
| License | MIT |

## Codebase Size

| Area | Files | Approx LOC |
|------|-------|-----------|
| `runtime/` | 59 | ~21 000 |
| `compiler/` | ~20 | ~6 200 |
| `cli/` | 17 | ~5 000 |
| `loader/` | 11 | ~3 000 |
| `test/` | 140+ | ~104 000 |
| `types/` | 30+ | — |
| `examples/` | 29 projects | — |

## Public API Surface

- **Runtime exports:** `pulse`, `effect`, `computed`, `batch`, `watch`,
  `el`, `mount`, `list`, `when`, `match`, `show`, `text`, `bind`, `on`, `model`,
  `createRouter`, `lazy`, `createStore`, `createActions`, `createContext`,
  `useForm`, `validators`, `useAsync`, `useResource`, `usePolling`, `useAbortable`,
  `createVersionedAsync`, `createHttp`, `createWebSocket`, `useWebSocket`,
  `createGraphQLClient`, `useQuery`, `useMutation`, `announce`, `trapFocus`,
  `renderToString`, `hydrate`, `animate`, `useSpring`, `useTransition`, `stagger`,
  `withPersistence`, `createLocalStorageAdapter`, `createIndexedDBAdapter`,
  `createSSE`, `useSSE`, `createI18n`, `escapeHtml`, `sanitizeUrl`, ...
- **Compiler exports:** `compile`, `parse`, `tokenize`
- **CLI binary:** `pulse` with 15+ subcommands

## Key Dependencies (dev-only — zero runtime deps)

None. The framework is entirely self-contained.

## Architecture Decisions (ADRs)

13 ADRs recorded in `adr/` directory. Key decisions:
- Signal-based reactivity (not VDOM)
- Adapter pattern for DOM (enables SSR and testing)
- CSS selector syntax for `el()` factory
- Zero external dependencies policy
- Node.js native test runner (not Jest)

## Recent Security Work

- 93 CodeQL alerts resolved (v1.11.4)
- URL scheme validation unified (`javascript://`, `vbscript://`, `data:`)
- TOCTOU file operation fixes
- Prototype pollution protection in persistence module

## Build Outputs

```
dist/           Production builds (generated by pulse build)
dist/pulse.min.js     Full bundle
dist/pulse-lite.min.js  Lite build (~5KB)
```
